name: PDF Annotator Pro
description: A modern PDF viewer with annotation support, dark mode, and more

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'self' https: blob: file:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self';
